title: Head of Revenue Operations

score_reason: Exceptional match: Head of Revenue Operations role aligns perfectly with Omri's 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps expertise, Salesforce mastery, and GTM scaling experience well beyond $30M ARR. Tel Aviv HQ collaboration and hybrid NY setup match his location preferences and willingness to work across time zones.

Would be worth a conversation given how rare it is to find someone with both your RevOps depth and cross-continental execution experience.
